reviewers.summary: No blocking findings. One advisory: unscopedPackageName() could be inlined but is well-named and testable as-is.
No blocking findings. One advisory: NpmBuilder doesn't cache pkgInfo for BinaryNameProvider (#1938 will add it).
No blocking findings. Two advisory: (1) unused string value in type switch could use a clarifying comment, (2) executables[0] access without length guard (cross-builder pattern for #1938).
